name: the per-rule grouping aggregates repeated occurrences of the same tool reporting id under one rule with a summed count
command: printf '%s' '{"version":"2.1.0","runs":[{"tool":{"driver":{"name":"checkov"}},"results":[{"ruleId":"CKV_K8S_16","level":"error","message":{"text":"x"}},{"ruleId":"CKV_K8S_16","level":"error","message":{"text":"y"}}]}]}' > a.sarif && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/group-findings-by-rule.sh" --dir . 2>e.txt; grep -q 'rule=checkov/CKV_K8S_16 tools=checkov count=2' e.txt && echo grouping-aggregates-by-rule 1>&2
